itemListElement.reviewBody: My Child is in this School. Teacher's are not handling child problems only they shut up kids. Senior students are misbehaving junior child in the bus as well as queue in canteen or any where. When Complin teachers she ignored. I am very worried about my child as girl. There is no discipline in class room too. Several PTM attended and same was complain by me to class teacher but no improvement. Child fear with the teacher. Jaypee Public School is only a business not more than that. I will definitely take TC to other school. Atmosphere is like Govt. School. I have to complete this session. Fee HIGH quality LOW.

itemReviewed.name: Jaypee Public School, Noida - Jaypee Greens Sector-128

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Jaypee is one of the big school and engineering college, it is situated in Noida sector 128, and many branches. There are two branches in noida and greater noida.
In noida sector 128 school classes are (pre-nursery up to 12th) in one building and the different building is for engineering College. The admission process are being according to the CBSC Board. The environment of the school and engineering college are very very good, safety, security and clean. So many parking area for the parents and guardian cars. The area of the school are very big and wide so many activity area are available for playing and for researchers. Very well educated staff's which are talking polity with guardian.
I love this environment very very much.

itemReviewed.name: Jaypee Public School, Noida - Jaypee Greens Sector-128

itemListElement.reviewBody: One of the very good quality schools of Noida sector 128 area. It has all the basic amenities of a good school. The infrastructure of the school is not that good. The quality of teachers hired is very good and they are trained to provoke learning in the students. Teachers are trained to give examples from real life which makes student develop a interest in the subject. The Jaypee Public School offers buses for students coming from different areas of Noida and the bus drivers are well mannered and polite. The bus given by the school is totally air conditioned and the kids are counted everyday to ensure total security of the kids. The school's cleaning  staff is good and proper cleaning is done from time to time. The principle of the school is polite and will listen to your queries and provide you with every assistance possible. The only issue with this school is it's location...it is located inside Jaypee Wish town which is totally migrated from the real world things and you won't find a single person on roads someday's which makes it unfit for kids in that area.
